titleStmt.title: SII 15.12: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 12. (B.K. No. 8 of 1930-31.) IṄGAḶĒŚVAR, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the wall (left of entrance) of the Nārāyaṇadēva temple.
This is dated Śaka 1054, Kīlaka, Kārttika-paurṇima, lunar eclipse, corresponding to 1128 A.D., November 8, Thursday. The Śaka year was, however, current.

It registers a grant of land and two oil-mills, made by Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Hermāḍiyarasa of the Kalachurya family for the worship and offerings in the temple of the god Nīlakaṇṭha, constructed by Nīlakaṇṭha-nāyaka, the Śrīkaraṇa of Mahāpradhāna Sāyipayya at the agrahāra of Iṅgaḷēśvara and for conducting a Purāṇa khaṇḍika. Hermāḍiyarasa is stated to have been governing Tardavāḍi-nāḍu at the time of the grant.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁ
bhavē . © jananāthaṁ tailapaṁ tailapanṛpatanayaṁ vīrasatyāśrayaṁ tattanujā
taṁ vairibhūpālakamadamathanaṁ vikramādityadēvaṁ ghanaśauryyaṁ taṁnṛpēṁdrānu
janatibaḷanappayyaṇōrvvīśanaṁtātana tammaṁ vīrasiṁhāsanapati jayasiṁhaṁ
nrisiṁhāvatāraṁ . Ā jayasiṁhanṛpēṁdratanūjaṁ traiḷōkyamallanā
havamallaṁ rājādhirājanā nriparājasutaṁ sōvidēva dharaṇīnātha . Ā dharaṇī
nāthānujanī dhareyaṁ himadinitta sētuvaneydalu sādhisi virōdhirāyadharā
dharavajraṁ caḷukyapati pesarvaḍedaṁ puduguḍadārggavī dhareyanōrvvane dōrvaladiṁ
de pāḷipeṁdadaṭinaḷurkkeyiṁ nahuṣaneṁbudagurvvina kārttavīryyanaṁbudu puru
kutsaneṁbudu purūravaneṁbudu rāmacaṁdraneṁbudu peṟatoṁdaneṁbude nega
rtteya vikramacakravartiya . Ātana tanayaṁ sakaḷamahītaḷapati ripunṛ
pāḷaraṁ nijapādābjātakkeṟagipa vīravinūtaṁ sōmēśvarakṣitīśaṁ negaḷdaṁ . Avanājñā
cakradiṁ sādhisi sakaḷamahīcekramaṁ ṣōḍaśōrvvīdhavaraṁ svācārasaṁpattiyini
ḷisi manōjāta maṁdāracaṁdradhruvariṁ prāpyaṁ jasaṁ bēḍidudane padedīvārppu sō
pamyarūpeṁbivaṟiṁdādhikyamaṁ tāḷdidanadhipatibhūlōkamallakṣitīśaṁ . ©
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭā
raka satyāśraya kuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmat bhūlōkamalladēva vijayarā
jyamuttarōttarābhivṟiddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ kalyāṇada nelavīḍi noḷu
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadi rājyaṁgeyuttumiralu . tatpādapadmārādhakaṁ © svasti samadhi gatapaṁ
camahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāḷāṁjarapuravarādhīśvaraṁ suvarṇnavriṣabhadhvajaṁ ḍamaru
ga tūrya nirgghōṣaṇaṁ kaḷacuryakuḷakamaḷamārtaṇḍaṁ kadanapracaṁḍa mānakanakā
caḷaṁ subhaṭarādityaṁ kaligaḷaṁkusaṁ gajasāmaṁtaṁ śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjaraṁ pratāpalaṁkē
śvaraṁ vairībhakaṁṭhīravaṁ niśśaṁkamallaṁ nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷē
śvaraṁ śrīmat hermmāḍiyarasaru sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ tarddavāḍināḍaṁ pratipā
ḷisuttamiḷdu © sakavarṣada 1051 neya kīlaka saṁvatsarada kārttika paurṇnamā
syayoḷu sōmagrahaṇa nimittadiṁ palavuṁ dānaṁgaḷaṁ māḍuttavirṛdu © śrī
manmahāpradhānaṁ maneverggaḍe daṇḍanāyakaṁ sāyipayyaṁgaḷa śrīkaraṇaṁ
nīlakaṁṭhanāyakaru śrīmaduttamadagrahāraviṁgaḷēśvarada naḍuve tā
vu māḍisida trikūṭada śrī nīlakaṁṭhēśvaradēvarggavara biṁnahadiṁ dēvatāpū
jegavaṁgabhōgakkaṁ nivēdyakkaṁ purāṇakhaṁḍika caitrapavitraviṁtinitakkaṁ tamma
dharmmavāgi dhārāpūrvakaṁ māḍi nāḍaherggaḍe daṁḍanāyakaṁ nāgadēvayya pra
mukha karaṇaṁgaḷge sammukhādēśadiṁ besasi yaruvaṇavāgi biṭṭa piriya kōla
kariya nelaṁ mattaru 100 hūdōṁṭa 1 dēvara naṁdādīvigegaṁ Ēkādasiya
bhyaṁgadeṇnegaṁ namasyavāgi biṭṭa gāṇa 2 Intī dharmmamanārorvaru pratipā
ḷisidargge gaṁge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradoḷ sāsirakavileyumaṁ
sāsira honnumaṁ vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge koṭṭaphaḷa © Ī dharmma
manaḷidaṁge gaṁge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradoḷ sāsira kavileyu
maṁ vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇarumanaḷida dōṣa © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō
harēti vasuṁdharāṁ śaṣṭhirvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ
sarvvānētānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrā bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ .
bahubhirvasudhā dattā rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhū
mistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . © .
Digital edition of SII 15.12 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
